text:
The Mandragora Meat (マンドラゴラの肉, Mandoragora no Niku) is an item found in Midonite. Hunter × Hunter: Altar of Dragon Vein 

Item Description

Meat (or roots) that drops from the rare plant-like beast Mandragora.

Plot

Altar of Dragon Vein

The Mandragora Meat is one of the four ingredients that Gourmet Hunter Menchi requests for her sidequest, obtained after killing a Mandragora.
